programme.title: The Drama Company
programme.desc: An eclectic mix of comedians explore who multiple genres of comedy. Starring Mithun Chakraborty as the ring master of a crew of highly misfit characters including Ali Asgar, Krushna Abhishek & others.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein
programme.desc: Dev Mehta, a top surgeon who can't remember his own skills & past 8 years of life. now, forced to restart as an intern and have to re-learn medicine and face the family he no longer knows.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Washington, health issues forced Zachary out of his dream home; he rented it to seemingly trustworthy tenants-only to realize they were alleged serial squatters who stopped paying and refused to leave; in one of his toughest fights yet, can Flash and his team take this home back?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: During renovations, Andrew's Philadelphia home was taken over by squatters who moved in, changed the locks, and installed security cameras; what begins as a straightforward case quickly escalates into a tense standoff with authorities, as Flash and his team attempt to reclaim the property without any help from the neighborhood.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Cleveland, Ray is ready to move back home-until he discovers an intruder linked to his previous tenant has taken over his house; when Flash and his team step inside, it's anything but a routine squatter removal job; the house is uninhabitable, and the danger runs far deeper than expected.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: When a stranger moves in and takes over the new home of Nabih and Kadeisha, Flash and his team are deployed to Dearborn, Michigan with one goal: out squat the squatter; but what starts as a straightforward job becomes a battle of endurance when the trespasser challenges Flash to see who can hold their ground the longest.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Trey's dream home renovation turns into a nightmare when he discovers squatters have taken over his Atlanta property; after forcing out two occupants, he's left battling a defiant holdout and a brazen fake landlord scheme fueling the chaos; but when Flash and his team arrive, they quickly realize this case will require a very different approach.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: When a man claims possession of a cherished family lake house in New York, Flash and his team race to reclaim it. Convinced he knows the law, the combative squatter refuses to budge, escalating tensions at every turn. With Flash going undercover next door, can he gather the intel he needs to outsmart the squatter and take back the home?

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Tennessee, a wrong-way confrontation at an apartment complex erupts into a shouting standoff with a surprising twist; in South Bend, Ind., a long-running feud over dogs, trash and surveillance turns toxic when one neighbor resorts to biological warfare; in Austin, Texas, a hallway dispute spirals from noise complaints into a battle of doorbell camera taunts.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Fond du Lac, Wisconsin, a parking dispute escalates on the day a man is expecting an important delivery; in Pennsylvania, a landlord and tenant clash after a mailbox is replaced without permission; and in Brooksville, Florida, a woman's patience is in the crosshairs when her neighbor sets up a backyard shooting range.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A pool party causes parking issues with the neighbors and throws the street into chaos; random dogs in a yard cause issues; a woman is proud of her seasonal house decorations until one opinionated neighbor calls it graffiti.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Michigan, a dispute over shared driveway parking puts neighbors at odds; in Ohio, a simple mail mix-up sparks an outsized reaction; and in Chicago, a routine move-out inspection turns into a heated showdown between renters and their landlord.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: South Carolina roommates are subjected to a string of bizarre insults by a neighbor outside their home; neighbors turn ugly in Oklahoma City when an apparent handshake agreement to not park in front of each other's houses is ignored.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A Utah woman and her neighbor argue over the building's heating; a Brooklyn landlord's boyfriend breaks through a tenant's door with an ax; neighbors in rural Nebraska squabble over the property line dividing their homes.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Georgia, a parent slaps the school bus driver after the driver refuses to let her kids off the bus; a woman returns to her parked car to find it covered in dog poop; prize-winning anglers are accused of stuffing their catch with weights.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: An Illinois man accuses his neighbor of putting garbage in their shared apartment hallway; in Texas, neighbors scuffle apparently over the best spots to view a Fourth of July parade.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A San Francisco man blows his lid when some neighbors don't park properly on a steep hill; in Denver, a dog trainer claims her unwelcome puppy advice ends a friendship with the woman opposite; in Virginia, neighbors engage in a shouting match.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A St. Louis family is alarmed when a neighbor bangs on their door with a hammer; when their leaf blower disappears, two sisters in Virginia decide to confront the neighbors.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: When a man installs a surveillance system at his East Coast beach house, the neighbor is so angry he drops his pants in protest; in Illinois, a man is awakened in the middle of the night by his elderly neighbor.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A lakefront beach in Illinois becomes a battleground when two neighbors yell over who is allowed to be there; a California woman sprays disinfectant at her neighbor.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Chesterfield, Virginia, a downstairs neighbor confrontation over moving noise quickly escalates; in Florida, a family is shocked when their doorbell camera captures a neighbor entering their home uninvited; and in Glenwood, Iowa, a man springs into action when an active shooter threatens his neighbor's home.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Portland, Oregon, a man standing in his own driveway is questioned by a neighbor about why he's there; in South Carolina's Blue Ridge Mountains, a tense balcony dispute escalates when a husband steps in to defend his family; and in Michigan, a mother who feels constantly watched decides to fight back, drawing plenty of attention.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Staten Island, rock legend Dee Snider of Twisted Sister and his wife, Suzette, are blindsided when her late father's caretaker refuses to leave the family home; but what starts as a friendly exchange between Flash and two long standing occupants, spirals into a full-scale battle with the squatter's family.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Patricia has called her Washington home her sanctuary for more than 60 years. But after the devastating loss of her son and a medical emergency forced her away, the house was overrun by rats and squatters. Now, with decades of memories being threatened, Flash is racing to help Patricia take back the home and the life that's being stolen from her.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In New York, Maria turns part of her home into an apartment for her grandson-but everything unravels when a negligent tenant living under the same roof as her, refuses to vacate; after barricading the door and cutting off access to her own space, Flash and his team face the escalating battle.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: A young couple in Philadelphia lists their home for sale, only to find a squatter already living in it; when confronted by Flash's team, he is completely shocked and produces a fraudulent lease; but can Flash see through the scam and help the homeowners take back what's rightfully theirs?

programme.desc: In a fight between co-workers over an alleged loan, Judge Judy advises never throwing sexual harassment charges around to avoid paying a debt.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Landlords allow an unauthorised walkthrough without the tenant's knowledge, then charge them for additional damages.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A delivery driver tells the harrowing story of his delivery of a 1K phone, his race to escape a Pit Bull, and the injuries he suffered.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A man sues his former friend for refusing to return 'Caesar' the German Shepherd after he took a trip to Guam wearing his $300 gold chain.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A contentious custody dispute allegedly clouds a woman's judgment when she sues the mother of her grandchild for the balance on a car loan.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: It's Alison and Zion's wedding day - will it all go without a hitch? Plus: Donna and Paul are keen to move into their gîte, but ceilings would be useful.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Will Muay Thai fanatic Saoirse's vegan Asian menu pack a punch in Glasgow.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: The final six celebrate autumn, spotlight trending ingredients and build an entire 'World of Candy' complete with pâtisserie pick 'n' mix. Who'll get a taste of sweet success.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: On a nostalgic revisit to the first ever Grand Design, from back in 1999, Kevin finds out if Tim and Jules are still flying high in their timber-framed home on the cliffs above Newhaven.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Milky comes to A&E with possible life-changing injuries after a road crash. Shaun has had a bad parachute landing. And a six-year-old has an unknown object stuck in his throat.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old William has been hit by a car and thrown 30 feet. Sixty-eight-year-old Stephen is struggling to breathe. And Ryan has broken his arm while playing rugby.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The heli-medics help a man with a single back wound who's not sure if he's been shot or stabbed. And a cyclist needs immediate life-saving treatment on the roadside.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Iris Prize Best British Shorts

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliff's worried about his girlfriend meeting his mum, but they get along famously. Rebecca aims to improve Sam's fertility.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca and Sam argue over what last name their future child should have, and look after Carla's unruly kids for a night.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: In an effort to get along with her mother-in-law, Debra spends a whole day cooking with Marie. Ray reluctantly agrees to take Robert and Frank to a car show.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray worries that he's passed on 'stupid' genes to Michael because his son may be held back a year at school, just like Ray was.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray thinks that a family portrait would make a great Christmas present for his parents, until Marie and Debra clash over who counts as 'family'.

programme.desc: Niles's ex-wife Maris needs his help. Can he keep her return secret from a pregnant and emotional Daphne.

programme.desc: Niles is suspected as an accomplice to murder, and Frasier accidentally recommends that his brother should be executed.
